name: dotlight-marketplace
description: Marketplace for DotLightSkillset — a lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers

plugins.name: dotlight-skillset
plugins.description: A lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers — Aspire (4 skills incl. aspire-mcp-first), OpenTelemetry, ILSpy, Blazor Playwright, 3 specialized .NET agents, rider-mcp-first (0.5.2 adds Rider-not-attached gate via AskUserQuestion to prevent silent filesystem-fallback token leak), grill-with-docs, improve-architecture, caveman.
